series_metadata.series_title: Pest Survey Data Forms and Gypsy Moth Trapper Data Downloads
series_metadata.series_description: Plant Pest Control Division uses GPS, G3, GIS software to track, capture, store, manipulate, analyze, manage, and present spatial or geographic data to track locations of invasive insects, create maps, and track locations of invasive insect traps throughout the State of Ohio. The data is stored within Plant Pest Control and G3 is archived by Virginia Tech indefinitely.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: originals are scanned into PPC drive and will be retained electronically. ; Paper: original document will be scanned and paper copy will be retained document is verified readable in our PPC drive; once paper copy is verified readable it will be put in waste paper
